zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Annie Staunton於1442年出生在英國素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞時，她的父親William Thomas De Staunton42歲，母親Millicent Mering33歲。她於1462年與John Thomas Thorolde在英國英格蘭素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Annie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Annie Staunton was born in 1442, in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, her father, William Thomas De Staunton, was 42 and her mother, Millicent Mering, was 33. She married John Thomas Thorolde in 1462, in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1520, at the age of 78.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Annie Stauntonが1442年にイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナで生まれた時，父William Thomas De Stauntonは42歳，母Millicent Meringは33歳であった。1462年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナでJohn Thomas Thoroldeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Annie Staunton(이)가 1442년 영국 수폴크 토른함 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Thomas De Staunton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Mering(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 토른함 매그나에서 John Thomas Thorolde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Annie Staunton родилась в 1442 г. в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Thomas De Staunton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Millicent Mering, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Thorolde в 1462 г. в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1520 г. в возрасте 78 лет.
